name: turboquant-sycl
description: SYCL kernel optimizer for Intel Arc Pro B70. Profile->test->optimize->measure loop. Mechanical gates enforce TDD + verifier + recording before push.

agentSpawn.command: bash -c 'cd infra/llama-cpp-turboquant 2>/dev/null || exit 0; printf "{\"optimization_log\": "; if [ -f OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md ]; then jq -Rs . OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md; else echo "\"No log yet. First task: measure baseline with llama-bench and populate OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md.\""; fi; printf ", \"git_state\": {\"branch\": \"%s\", \"last_commit\": \"%s\", \"unpushed\": %s}" "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" "$(git log --oneline -1 2>/dev/null)" "$(git log --oneline origin/sycl-support..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " ")"; UNPUSHED=$(git log --oneline origin/sycl-support..HEAD 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$UNPUSHED" -gt 0 ]; then printf ", \"next_step\": \"You have %s unpushed commit(s). Resume: spawn turboquant-verifier subagent, then git push, then spawn turboquant-release subagent.\"}" "$UNPUSHED"; else printf ", \"next_step\": \"Clean state. Start next iteration: read OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md, profile with llama-bench, identify bottleneck kernel.\"}"; fi'

preToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *git\ push*) cd infra/llama-cpp-turboquant 2>/dev/null || exit 0; LAST_COMMITS=$(git log --oneline -5 --diff-filter=AM -- tests/ 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$LAST_COMMITS" | grep -q "test\|bench\|assert"; then echo "TDD violation. Commit a test under tests/ before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; LOG_UPDATED=$(git diff origin/sycl-support..HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -c OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md); if [ "$LOG_UPDATED" -eq 0 ]; then echo "Recording violation. Update OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md with iteration results before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; if [ ! -f /tmp/turboquant-verifier-passed ]; then echo "Verifier not run. Spawn turboquant-verifier subagent and get OVERALL: PASS before pushing." >&2; exit 2; fi; rm -f /tmp/turboquant-verifier-passed ;; esac'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.path // .tool_input.targetFile" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */ggml-sycl/*.cpp|*/ggml-sycl/*.hpp) cd infra/llama-cpp-turboquant 2>/dev/null || exit 0; RECENT_TEST=$(git log --oneline -3 --diff-filter=AM -- tests/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$RECENT_TEST" ]; then echo "No test committed yet. TDD requires failing test before kernel code." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in */ggml-sycl/*.cpp|*/ggml-sycl/*.hpp) cd infra/llama-cpp-turboquant 2>/dev/null || exit 0; RECENT_TEST=$(git log --oneline -3 --diff-filter=AM -- tests/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$RECENT_TEST" ]; then echo "No test committed yet. TDD requires failing test before kernel code." >&2; exit 1; fi ;; esac'

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); RESULT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_response.result 2>/dev/null); TOOL_INPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .tool_input 2>/dev/null); if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "verifier"; then if echo "$RESULT" | grep -q "OVERALL: PASS"; then touch /tmp/turboquant-verifier-passed; fi; fi'
